summary: Vision validation harness passed locally. Unit tests prove the OCR/image path can trigger and upgrade an uncertain record, and the Phase 9 docs define the minimum production validation standard.
checks: backend/tests/test_phase8_gating.py proves image fallback can trigger and upgrade UNCERTAIN -> ACCEPTED.
docs/phases/phase-9/vision-validation-scenarios.md defines scenarios, metrics, and minimum validation rules.
Production case pack includes an image-bearing skincare case and monitoring now reports image fallback counts explicitly.
